chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1832 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to the maintainability. 22.10.2025. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General ------------------------------------ This matter was lastly fixed before the Court on 31.05.2024 when none was present on behalf of the petitioner. However, matter was adjourned by way of indulgence. In the last 11⁄2 year learned counsel for the petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Petitioner has yet to satisfy this Court on the issue of maintainability but the point still remains unresolved. Today despite lapse of 11⁄2 year learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
